title: Reject Request Brief without accepted planning record grounding
summary: This Request Brief remains contract-valid but is under-evidenced for bounded Task Packet generation.

lineage.rationale: The flow must fail closed when no planning baseline is provided.

work_object_refs.notes: The target work object exists, but no planning record baseline is attached.

evidence.summary: R3-005 requires fail-closed handling for under-evidenced planning inputs.

audit.notes: This fixture is reserved for fail-closed flow testing only.

request_intent: Attempt Task Packet generation without a planning baseline.
requested_outcome: Demonstrate that the bounded planning flow rejects under-evidenced Request Brief input.
operator_questions: Does the planning flow reject Request Briefs that do not carry any planning baseline?
